commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens Harmony plain-text tool-call parsing for namespaced targets and routes WebChat chat history plus live assistant deltas through the canonical assistant-visible-text sanitizer with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +95, Tests +154. Total +249 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes by source inspection: current main does not parse dotted Harmony targets and the WebChat history/streaming paths bypass sanitizer coverage for the reported raw scaffolding shape; the linked issue also has screenshot evidence.
